case_title: JIMMY TAM VS. MINH C. HUYNH

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TAM, JIMMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, JIMMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2010 BY SLAVI. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY TAM, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-12-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD". COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
REQUEST FOR VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER, WAIVER (IFP) GRANTED, FILED BY DEFENDANT HUYNH, MINH C.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TAM, JIMMY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
